meta.title: Diyae — Zakat & Donations Platform
meta.description: Islamic non-profit platform for Zakat, donations and community support

nonprofit.text: Diyae is a 100% non-profit platform — Donations go directly to beneficiaries via bank transfer
nonprofit.textFr: Diyae is 100% non-profit — Your donations go directly to beneficiaries by bank transfer

howItWorks.title: How does Diyae work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: The beneficiary submits their request with required documents
howItWorks.step2Desc: The Diyae team reviews the request within 48-72 hours
howItWorks.step3Desc: The donor transfers directly to the beneficiary's account
howItWorks.step4Desc: Reports and proofs are published for every cause

zakatTeaser.title: Zakat Calculator
zakatTeaser.description: Calculate your Zakat accurately according to the four schools of jurisprudence
zakatTeaser.bullet1: Zakat is one of the five pillars of Islam
zakatTeaser.bullet2: Obligatory for every Muslim who owns the Nissab
zakatTeaser.bullet3: Zakat rate is 2.5% of net assets
zakatTeaser.bullet4: A full lunar year (Hawl) must have passed

siteDonation.title: Help us keep Diyae open for everyone
siteDonation.description: Diyae is entirely volunteer-run. Your donation only covers operating costs.
siteDonation.transparencyNote: Every cent is spent transparently — accounts are available to everyone

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.t1Text: Thanks to Diyae, I was able to pay for my son's treatment. May Allah reward you.
testimonials.t2Text: A transparent and reliable platform. The transfer reached me directly without any intermediary.
testimonials.t3Text: Diyae helped us collect donations to build a Quranic school in the village.

footer.tagline: Islamic non-profit platform for Zakat and donations

demandes.newRequestSub: Complete the following steps to submit your request
demandes.submitted: Your request has been submitted successfully
demandes.reviewNotice: You will receive an email when your request is reviewed
